isn't it too old... get floor plan .

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

> 1997 Gulfstream 4SP   serial number 1309
> Total time 3200 hours / HUD installed
> Ask price was 24M / lowered to 23.250M
> 
> Bombardier owns aircraft in inventory, taken on
> trade.
> 
> Previous owner Con Agra.
> 
> Bombardier had a deal to sell aircraft, purchaser
> died and left Bombardier 
> hanging.
> Deal was suppose to be for 23M.
> Aircraft was offered to Jack Pruitt (a wholesaler).
> For that price.
> He turned it down, may have offered 22.6M for his
> inventory,
> according to Chip (Ted Wait's pilot / who is a close
> friend of Pruitt).
> 
> Bombardier may deal on this aircraft in the low 22's
> since their has been no 
> real buyers in the market.
> 
> Just an option.
> Larry V

body_html:
isn't it too old... get floor plan .

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

1997 Gulfstream 4SP serial number 1309
Total time 3200 hours / HUD installed
Ask price was 24M / lowered to 23.250M

Bombardier owns aircraft in inventory, taken on
trade.

Previous owner Con Agra.

Bombardier had a deal to sell aircraft, purchaser
died and left Bombardier
hanging.
Deal was suppose to be for 23M.
Aircraft was offered to Jack Pruitt (a wholesaler).
For that price.
He turned it down, may have offered 22.6M for his
inventory,
according to Chip (Ted Wait's pilot / who is a close
friend of Pruitt).

Bombardier may deal on this aircraft in the low 22's
since their has been no
real buyers in the market.

Just an option.
Larry V
